text: I'm here to check in.
description: 入住登记标准用语。
examples_json: [{"en":"Hi, I'm here to check in. My booking is under Li.","zh":"你好，我来办理入住，预订姓名是李。","level":"basic"}]

text: My booking is under the name...
description: 说明预订人姓名，前台核对预订信息时使用。

text: Here is my student ID.
description: 出示学生证作为身份证明。

text: Could you tell me where my room is?
description: 用 could you 开头更礼貌，前台会告诉你房间号和楼层。

text: Is there Wi-Fi in the building?
description: 询问宿舍有无 Wi-Fi。英美宿舍 Wi-Fi 一般用学生账号(eduroam)登录。

text: Where is the laundry room?
description: 询问公共洗衣房位置。英美宿舍洗衣房通常用 App 支付。

text: Is there a shared kitchen?
description: 询问有无公共厨房。记得 label your food(给食物贴标签)。

text: How do I get to the campus from here?
description: 询问从宿舍到学校的路线。

text: I need to report a maintenance issue.
description: 报修通用句。紧急情况可以说 it's urgent。

text: The heater isn't working.
description: 报修具体设备——heater(暖气)/light(灯)/sink(水槽)。

text: When can someone come to fix it?
description: 询问维修人员到达时间。

text: Is there an app for maintenance requests?
description: 很多英美大学用 App 提交报修请求。

text: I have a package to pick up.
description: 去前台领快递的标准说法。

text: Do I need to sign for it?
description: 询问是否需要签字签收。sign for it = 签字领取。

text: Where do I pick up deliveries?
description: delivery 包括快递和外卖。通常前台代收。

text: It's nice to meet you.
description: 初次见面时的标准礼貌用语。回应: Nice to meet you too。

text: I'm from... / I just moved in.
meaning: 我来自... / 我刚搬进来。
description: 介绍自己来自哪里、刚搬来。flatmate 比 roommate 更准确。

text: My major is... / I'm studying...
meaning: 我的专业是... / 我在学...
description: 介绍专业。如果名称复杂，说 I'm studying... 即可。

text: What do you do in your free time?
description: 询问兴趣爱好，比直接问 hobbies 更自然。

text: I'm into... (photography / cooking / hiking).
description: I'm into... 比 I like... 更地道。聊爱好是很好的破冰话题。

text: Have you tried... (Chinese food / hotpot)?
description: 聊食物是万能的社交话题。可以顺势邀请一起做饭。

text: It's near... / It's famous for...
meaning: 它在...附近 / 它以...闻名。
description: 描述家乡位置和特色。老外可能不知道你的城市，用 nearby Shanghai 参考。

text: Would you like to grab dinner sometime?
description: 邀请室友吃饭的常用表达。grab dinner 比 have dinner 更 casual。

text: Let's cook together tonight.
description: 提议一起做饭。可以展示自己国家的菜。potluck = 每人带一道菜。

text: Let's split the bill. / It's on me.
description: split the bill = AA 制。It's on me = 我请客。国外 AA 制是常态。

text: Let's set some ground rules.
meaning: 我们来定一些基本规则吧。
description: ground rules = 基本规则。用轻松的语气开口，不尴尬。

text: Quiet hours after 11pm?
description: quiet hours = 安静时间。Noise 是最常见的室友矛盾来源。

text: Whose turn is it to take out the rubbish?
description: 倒垃圾 = take out the rubbish。垃圾分类: recycling bin vs general waste。

text: Do you mind if I have friends over?
description: 询问是否可以带访客。have friends over = 邀请朋友来。尊重室友的 personal space。

text: How do I use this washing machine?
description: 第一次用宿舍洗衣房的标配问题。washing machine = 洗衣机。

text: Is this machine available?
meaning: 这台机器能用吗/有人用吗？
description: 询问机器是否空闲。高峰期(周末下午)可能要排队。

text: How long does a cycle take?
description: cycle = 洗衣周期。一般洗30-40分钟，烘40-60分钟。

text: Do I need an app or coins?
meaning: 需要用 App 还是投币？
description: 英美大学洗衣房大多用 App(如 Circuit Laundry)支付，下载→充值→扫码启动。

text: Where can I buy detergent?
description: detergent = 洗衣液。宿舍便利店(campus shop)有卖但偏贵。

text: Do I need fabric softener?
description: fabric softener = 柔顺剂。选 fragrance-free(无香型)比较不会冒犯室友。

text: Should I bring my own laundry basket?
meaning: 我需要自己带洗衣篮吗？
description: laundry basket = 洗衣篮。有些宿舍提供，有些不提供。

text: Is this your laundry? It's finished.
meaning: 这是你的衣服吗？已经洗好了。
description: 委婉提醒别人取衣服。laundry = 洗好的衣物。

text: Someone left their clothes in the machine.
meaning: 有人把衣服留在机器里了。
description: 洗衣房最大禁忌：洗完不取。等5-10分钟没人来可以拿出来放干净地方。

text: You can put them on this clean surface.
meaning: 你可以放在这个干净的台面上。
description: 帮别人取出来的衣物要放干净地方(clean surface)，不是地上！

text: Set a timer on your phone so you don't forget.
meaning: 在手机上设个计时器，别忘了。
description: 洗衣房必备生存技巧：设 timer 提醒自己回来取。

text: I'm looking for this book.
description: 去 help desk 找书的开场白。可以先在 library catalogue(网上目录)查 call number。

text: Can I borrow this? / When is it due?
meaning: 我能借这本书吗？/ 什么时候还？
description: borrow/check out = 借书。due date = 到期日。overdue = 逾期，要罚款(fine)。

text: Can I renew it online?
description: renew = 续借。英美大学图书馆基本支持网上续借。

text: Where is the quiet study area?
description: quiet area / silent zone = 安静区(不能说话)。讨论去 group study area。

text: Can I book a study room?
meaning: 我能预约一间学习室吗？
description: study room = 学习室。期末季至少提前一周预约。

text: How many people can it fit?
description: 学习室通常有人数要求(2-6人)。group study room 适合小组讨论。

text: How long can we use it for?
description: 一般一次约1-2小时。超过时间别人会来。

text: How do I print something?
description: 打印 = print。英美大学用 printing credit(打印额度)，刷学生卡 release。

text: How much does it cost per page?
description: 打印通常从 printing credit 扣，黑白便宜彩色贵。top up = 充值。

text: Is there a scanner I can use?
description: scanner = 扫描仪。很多打印机支持 scan to email(扫描发邮箱)。

text: Can I print from my laptop?
meaning: 我能从自己的笔记本电脑打印吗？
description: wireless printing = 无线打印。连学校 Wi-Fi 发送到 print queue。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I send the document to the printer from my laptop?","zh":"我能从笔记本电脑把文件发到打印机吗？","level":"basic"}]

text: What time is check-out?
description: 询问退房时间。一般宿舍退房是上午 10 点，问清楚避免超时罚款。

text: What's the Wi-Fi password?
description: 比 Is there Wi-Fi 更进一步——直接要密码。校园网通常叫 eduroam，用学生账号登录。

text: The sink is leaking.
description: 报修具体故障——leaking(漏水)/clogged(堵了)/broken(坏了)。

text: Can you hold my package until this evening?
meaning: 能帮我保管包裹到今晚吗？
description: 请前台多保管一会。hold = 暂存/保管。

text: Where are you from? / How are you settling in?
meaning: 你来自哪里？/ 你安顿得怎么样？
description: 反向关心对方——聊天不是单向输出。settle in = 安顿下来。

text: That sounds interesting! / I've never been there.
meaning: 听起来很有趣！/ 我没去过。
description: 聊天衔接句——给对方反馈，让对话自然延续。

text: We should go together sometime.
description: 把聊天变成邀约——从 small talk 过渡到 hang out。

text: I'll bring some snacks / dessert.
description: potluck 的标配回复——主动带东西。snacks = 零食，dessert = 甜点。

text: Can we take turns cleaning?
description: take turns = 轮流。cleaning rota = 打扫轮值表。

text: The app isn't working. Is there another way to pay?
meaning: App 用不了，有别的方式支付吗？
description: App 出问题是洗衣房日常。备用方案：找宿舍前台买洗衣卡(laundry card)。

text: Can I borrow some detergent? I'll replace it.
meaning: 能借点洗衣液吗？我会还的。
description: 临时借洗衣液的礼貌说法。replace = 还/补上。室友之间互相借是常态。

text: Is this book available? / It's already checked out.
meaning: 这本书在馆吗？/ 已经被借走了。
description: 查书后的两个结果。checked out = 已借出。可以 ask to put it on hold(预约)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is this book available? It seems to be checked out.","zh":"这本书在馆吗？好像被借走了。","level":"basic"}]

text: I need to top up my printing credit.
description: top up = 充值。打印额度用完了去 student portal 充值。
examples_json: [{"en":"I've run out of printing credit. How do I top it up?","zh":"我打印额度用完了，怎么充值？","level":"basic"}]

text: It's quite urgent — there's water leaking onto the floor.
meaning: 挺紧急的——水漏到地板上了。
description: urgent 报修升级表达。强调紧急性以获得更快响应。

text: How does it compare to life back home?
meaning: 和你在家乡的生活比怎么样？
description: 更深入的聊天——不只是 where are you from，而是让对方对比两种生活。

text: I'm fine with that, but could we be a bit more flexible on weekends?
meaning: 我没问题，但周末能不能灵活一点？
description: 协商(negotiation)——先同意再提条件。flexible = 灵活的。

text: I'll cook this time — you can do the next one.
description: 轮流做饭的自然表达。take turns = 轮流。

text: Is it fully booked all week?
description: fully booked = 约满了。期末季学习室超级抢手。
examples_json: [{"en":"The study rooms are fully booked all week because of exams.","zh":"因为考试，学习室这周全约满了。","level":"basic"}]

text: It keeps showing an error code.
description: 机器出问题时描述——keep doing = 一直做某事。error code = 错误代码。
examples_json: [{"en":"The machine keeps showing error code E03. What does that mean?","zh":"机器一直显示E03错误码，什么意思？","level":"basic"}]
